profile.name: Aurnab Das
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.tagline: Crafting high-performance mobile experiences with scalable architecture
profile.summary: 6+ years of experience building production-grade Flutter applications for Android & iOS, specializing in performance optimization, automation, and scalable system design.

how_i_work.title: Clean Architecture
how_i_work.desc: I believe in writing code that is easy to read, test, and maintain long-term.

how_i_work.title: Performance First
how_i_work.desc: Every millisecond matters. I optimize apps for speed, responsiveness, and efficiency.

how_i_work.title: User-Centric
how_i_work.desc: I design with real users in mind — intuitive interfaces that solve real problems.

how_i_work.title: Continuous Learning
how_i_work.desc: Technology evolves fast. I stay ahead by exploring new tools and patterns.

projects.title: FinTrack – Personal Finance App
projects.short_description: Cross-platform app for managing personal finances with real-time analytics.

details.overview: A mobile-first finance management solution designed for scalability and real-time syncing.
details.problem: Users lacked a simple yet powerful way to track expenses across devices with real-time updates.
details.solution: Implemented Flutter architecture with optimized state management and Firebase sync.

projects.title: AutoTasker – Automation Suite
projects.short_description: Python-based automation tools for repetitive business workflows.

details.solution: Built modular automation scripts using Python.

projects.title: Extendify – Chrome Extension Toolkit
projects.short_description: Productivity browser extension with multi-tab management and automation.

details.overview: A powerful Chrome extension for power users focused on productivity.
details.problem: Browser tab management and repetitive actions slow down daily workflows.
details.solution: Built a feature-rich extension with tab grouping, macros, and API integrations.

projects.title: HealthPulse – Wellness Tracker
projects.short_description: Flutter health app with wearable integrations and AI insights.

details.overview: Cross-platform wellness app connecting wearables with intelligent dashboards.
details.problem: Fragmented health data across multiple wearable platforms.
details.solution: Unified data layer with intelligent health insights powered by Python ML models.

projects.title: Shiply – Logistics Platform
projects.short_description: Real-time shipment tracking app with driver and customer portals.

details.overview: End-to-end logistics platform with real-time tracking and multi-role access.
details.problem: Logistics companies lacked real-time visibility and customer communication.
details.solution: Built dual-portal app with live GPS, push notifications, and route optimization.

achievements: Contributed to open source Flutter packages

about.description: I specialize in building scalable, high-performance mobile applications using Flutter. With over 6 years of hands-on experience, I focus on designing systems that are efficient, maintainable, and impactful. Beyond mobile, I develop automation tools using Python to streamline workflows, and I build Chrome extensions that boost developer productivity. I thrive at the intersection of elegant engineering and real-world impact.

testimonials.name: Rahim Uddin
testimonials.feedback: Arif consistently delivers high-quality solutions and brings strong architectural thinking to every project. He is one of the most reliable engineers I have worked with.

testimonials.name: Sara Malik
testimonials.feedback: Working with Arif was a pleasure. He translates complex requirements into clean, scalable code and always meets deadlines.
